title: Integromat vs Make
description: We compare Integromat (now Make) across its evolution from visual automation builder to comprehensive integration platform for complex workflows.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Make emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Integromat or Make?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Make edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Integromat excels at Integromat is a automation platform that helps Marketers and Operations Teams an, while Make is stronger for Advanced no-code automation with visual scenario builder.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Integromat and Make?
faqs.answer: Integromat and Make differ in pricing (Free – $29/mo vs Free–$29/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Integromat cheaper than Make?
faqs.answer: Integromat starts at Free – $29/mo while Make starts at Free–$29/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Integromat or Make?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for automation. Make scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Integromat and Make together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Integromat or Make?
faqs.answer: Both Integromat and Make prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which automation tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Integromat for large teams, while Make may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $29/mo pricing.
